name: Java Collections Framework Architecture
description: An architectural deep-dive into the Java Collections Framework (JCF). This diagram illustrates the core hierarchy starting from the Iterable and Collection interfaces, branching into the specialized List, Set, and Queue sub-hierarchies. It also showcases the separate but integral Map hierarchy. This map helps developers understand which concrete implementation (like ArrayList, HashSet, or HashMap) to choose based on performance requirements and data structure behavior.
code:
graph TD
  Iterable[Iterable Interface] --> Collection[Collection Interface]
  
  subgraph ListHierarchy [List Hierarchy]
    Collection --> List[List Interface]
    List -.-> ArrayList[ArrayList]
    List -.-> LinkedList[LinkedList]
    List -.-> Vector[Vector]
  end

  subgraph SetHierarchy [Set Hierarchy]
    Collection --> Set[Set Interface]
    Set -.-> HashSet[HashSet]
    Set -.-> LinkedHashSet[LinkedHashSet]
    Set --> SortedSet[SortedSet Interface]
    SortedSet -.-> TreeSet[TreeSet]
  end

  subgraph QueueHierarchy [Queue Hierarchy]
    Collection --> Queue[Queue Interface]
    Queue -.-> PriorityQueue[PriorityQueue]
    Queue --> Deque[Deque Interface]
    Deque -.-> ArrayDeque[ArrayDeque]
    Deque -.-> LinkedList
  end

  subgraph MapHierarchy [Map Hierarchy]
    Map[Map Interface] -.-> HashMap[HashMap]
    Map -.-> Hashtable[Hashtable]
    Map -.-> LinkedHashMap[LinkedHashMap]
    Map --> SortedMap[SortedMap Interface]
    SortedMap -.-> TreeMap[TreeMap]
  end

  %% Styling nodes for visibility
  classDef interfaceNode fill:#e1f5fe,stroke:#01579b,stroke-width:2px,color:#000
  classDef classNode fill:#fff3e0,stroke:#e65100,stroke-width:2px,color:#000
  
  class Iterable,Collection,List,Set,SortedSet,Queue,Deque,Map,SortedMap interfaceNode
  class ArrayList,LinkedList,Vector,HashSet,LinkedHashSet,TreeSet,PriorityQueue,ArrayDeque,HashMap,Hashtable,LinkedHashMap,TreeMap classNode

  %% Subgraph Styling
  style ListHierarchy fill:transparent,stroke:#94a3b8,stroke-dasharray: 5 5
  style SetHierarchy fill:transparent,stroke:#94a3b8,stroke-dasharray: 5 5
  style QueueHierarchy fill:transparent,stroke:#94a3b8,stroke-dasharray: 5 5
  style MapHierarchy fill:transparent,stroke:#94a3b8,stroke-dasharray: 5 5
